title: Lavender Celebration
description: A celebration recognizing and honoring LGBTQIA+ graduates and their achievements. An affirming space to celebrate identity, community, and accomplishment.
longDescription: The Lavender Celebration is a pre-commencement ceremony that recognizes and honors the achievements of CCA's LGBTQIA+ graduates. This affirming event celebrates the intersections of identity, creativity, and community. Graduates, allies, families, and friends are all welcome to join in this meaningful gathering.
